review:
Decent fast food at the International Plaza food court. 

If you want a faster meal than you'd get at a fast-casual restaurant like Outback, you can go to Aussie Grill by Outback for many of the same food items, made easy to eat at a mall.

My husband got the volcano shrimp and a basic burger. I had the grilled chicken sandwich. My kids had the kids meals with crispy chicken.

Everything was pretty good, although a little salty (which, I know, is part of why they are good). My chicken had a good amount of spicy kick from the jalapenos, and the meat was juicy. My husband liked his burger, although he did not want bacon on it (weird, I know!). My kids liked their chicken and french fries.

The IP mall food court is usually pretty clean and is always well-lit and airy. And there are a lot of seats, many with power outlets. It is a convenient place to have a quick meal.
